task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Cas9 RNP Preparation' task within the correct project and experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should display the SciNote interface with the task 'Cas9 RNP Preparation' open. The breadcrumbs or sidebar should indicate Project: 'CRISPR Assay Development' and Experiment: 'In vitro Cleavage'.

The text 'Cas9 Nuclease' must be visible in the task description and formatted as a hyperlink (typically blue and/or underlined). If a link editing popup is visible in any screenshot, it should show the URL 'https://www.neb.com/products/m0386-cas9-nuclease-s-pyogenes'.

The text 'pX330' must be visible in the task description and formatted as a hyperlink (typically blue and/or underlined). If a link editing popup is visible in any screenshot, it should show the URL 'https://www.addgene.org/42230/'.

task_completion.description: Add the required safety warning text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Critical: Keep enzymes on ice at all times.' must be visible in the task description.
The word 'Critical:' (including the colon) within the warning text must be visually formatted in bold font weight.

The final screenshots should show the task description in a saved state (e.g., the rich text editor toolbar is no longer active, or a 'Save' button was clicked and changes are reflected in the view mode).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SciNote web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SciNote web application in a browser, not a terminal, script editor, or direct API interaction tool.

integrity.description: The agent created actual hyperlinks rather than just pasting raw URLs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Cas9 Nuclease' and 'pX330' should be styled as clickable links. The raw URLs (https://www.neb.com/... and https://www.addgene.org/...) should not just be pasted as plain text next to the words.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and used to inject HTML directly into the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: 'CRISPR Assay Development' | Experiment: 'In vitro Cleavage' | Task: 'Cas9 RNP Preparation'. Expected link 1: Text 'Cas9 Nuclease' pointing to 'https://www.neb.com/products/m0386-cas9-nuclease-s-pyogenes'. Expected link 2: Text 'pX330' pointing to 'https://www.addgene.org/42230/'. Expected warning text: 'Critical: Keep enzymes on ice at all times.' with exactly 'Critical:' in bold.
